title: Campaign Monitor vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs HubSpot: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than HubSpot?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or HubSpot?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
